items.question: Do I need fishing experience to join?
items.answer: No — reef and night fishing trips are beginner-friendly, with crew who'll help you the whole way. Big game trolling is more physically demanding and better suited to those with some experience.

items.question: Is equipment provided, or do I need to bring my own?
items.answer: Rods, tackle, and bait are included with almost every charter — we'll confirm this specifically for your booking so there's no surprise on the day.

items.question: What happens to the fish we catch?
items.answer: Most resorts and guesthouses will prepare your catch for dinner on request — we'll check this is possible with your specific property before your trip.

items.question: Can kids join a fishing trip?
items.answer: Yes — reef and night fishing trips work well for families with older children. Big game trolling is a longer, more demanding day, better suited to adults and teens.
